_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the activity-variant-mismatch (branch 1) of the excel-activities/append-range-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (BusinessException 'Append Range activity must be placed inside a Use Excel File container') → jobs logs (no Use Excel File scope opened before the activity; the agent fired against a workbook path it could not acquire) → workflow source. The Modern AppendRangeX at the workflow root with no surrounding scope is the smoking gun.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f0088888-3333-4444-5555-666677778888 --state Faulted --output json
